text: “Laned highway” means a highway which is divided into two or more clearly marked lanes for vehicular traffic.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.110 — “Laned highway” defined.

“Laned highway” means a highway which is divided into two or more clearly marked lanes for vehicular traffic.

subsections.text: “Laned highway” means a highway which is divided into two or more clearly marked lanes for vehicular traffic.
